narrative:
Cols 69-J (precinct in Franklin County) has 803 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
